title: hieracium reducatum
intro: Hieracium reducatum, also known as Hawkweed or Red Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Hieracium reducatum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots, leaves, and flowers can be used in herbal preparations.
